model_hints.description: Host-agnostic model preferences for sub-agents the loop dispatches. Values are short class names ('haiku', 'sonnet', 'opus') that the host translates to concrete model IDs. The single-session driver (bugfix:run-ticket) inherits the session model for stages themselves; these keys configure sub-agent dispatch within the loop.

bot_author_allowlist.description: Additional comment-author logins (besides GitHub's [bot]-suffix and authorAssociation==BOT) that ticket-adapter should treat as bot comments for resume-detection purposes. Used to exempt service accounts (Slack mirrors, release bots, etc.) from triggering spurious resume signals.
